scripts.db:generate: cd apps/api && pnpm prisma generate --schema src/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:migrate: cd apps/api && pnpm prisma migrate dev --schema src/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:push: cd apps/api && pnpm prisma db push --schema src/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:seed: cd apps/api && pnpm prisma db seed
scripts.db:studio: cd apps/api && pnpm prisma studio --schema src/prisma/schema.prisma
